name: Spam Hashbrown Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen hashbrown potatoes, thawed slightly (32 oz)
1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed (12 oz)
1 can Cream of chicken soup (10 3/4 oz)
1/4 cup CHI-CHI's Diced Green Chilies, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the potatoes, melted butter, salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
3. In another bowl, mix together the cheese, SPAM, soup, sour cream, milk, onion, and green chilies.
4. Add the SPAM mixture to the potato mixture; stir well to combine.
5. Pour the mixture into a 2-quart baking dish.
6. Sprinkle with crushed potato chips.
7. Bake for 45-60 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
